items.title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
items.summary: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.

items.title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
items.summary: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it.

items.title: Zelensky says allies asked him to scale back attacks on Russian energy
items.summary: Ukraine's president says partners asked if the attacks could be "reduced" as prices soar due to the Iran war.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 稱外星人為「惡魔」 美副總統范斯承諾徹查UFO真相
items.summary: 美國副總統范斯（JD Vance）表示，他認為外星人是「惡魔」（demons），承諾他將花時間調查他對不明飛行物（UFO）與外星訪客的「痴迷」（obsession）。  ...…

items.title: 負責封鎖荷姆茲海峽 伊朗海軍司令被以軍炸死
items.summary: 〔編譯林家宇／綜合報導〕伊朗卅日證實，以色列的空襲造成伊斯蘭革命衛隊（IRGC）海軍司令湯西里（Alireza Tangsiri）喪命，成為德黑蘭當局證實在這場戰爭中殉職的最新一位高階官員。以色列指稱，湯西里應為封鎖荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）負責。 以色列國防部長卡茲（Isra…

items.title: 美官員︰川普考慮奪伊朗近千磅鈾
items.summary: 〔國際新聞中心／綜合報導〕美國官員透露，總統川普正考慮發動一項軍事行動，以從伊朗取出近一千磅的鈾；這是一項複雜且高風險的任務，可能會讓美軍在該國境內停留數日或更長時間。 華爾街日報廿九日獨家報導，官員表示，川普尚未決定是否下令，正考量美軍面臨的危險。但官員指出，川普對此想法仍抱持開放態度，因為這有…
